name: Pizza Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Hot or mild pork sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage in a skillet over medium heat; drain.
2. Stir in pizza sauce, ketchup, and garlic powder; set aside.
3. Press biscuits into 20 well-greased muffin cups.
4. Spoon 1 or 2 tablespoons of the meat sauce into each biscuit.
5. Top with mozzarella cheese and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Refrigerate or freeze any remaining meat sauce.
Yield: 20 pizzas.
